raw: Each pass admits up to 6 people. Charge is $9 per adult and $6 per child with pass. Admission for children under 2 is free. Passes can only be used for daytime admission and cannot be used for Stone Zoo Zoolights or Franklin Park Zoo Boston Lights . This pass does not need to be returned to the library. Timed ticket reservations are no longer required, but please check https://www.zoonewengland.org/ for any policy and schedule updates before planning your visit. Proof of vaccination is no longer required to visit the zoo. Learn more on Franklin Park Zoo's Health & Safety page.

source_phrases.audience_policies[2].form: Admission for children under 2 is free
